A0155.title: Decentralized On-Chain Identity Verification
A0155.definition: The use of decentralized identity technologies such as DID to achieve identity verification without relying on centralized authorities.
A0155.description: DID scheme: W3C DID standard; on-chain identity anchoring; verifiable credentials; selective disclosure; self-sovereign identity; cross-platform interoperability.
A0155.limitation: Immature ecosystem; poor user experience; low regulatory acceptance.
